signals.reasoning: Keep managing the live COMP long rather than closing it here. It is still green, it has retained a usable portion of peak P&L, and it remains the strongest long structure on the board even though veto keeps it from being an add.
Cover the live STBL short immediately. The position has gone from a winner to a live loss, retained none of peak P&L, and the urgent warning means the trade has clearly failed.
Cover the live MON short. It has only retained about 40% of peak P&L, the warning is urgent, and the board still leans bullish against the short thesis.
BTC is stable but veto keeps benchmark exposure in watch mode.
ETH remains mixed and does not offer enough directional edge to justify action during the event brake.
SOL has a constructive squeeze profile, but veto should keep it sidelined for now rather than turning it into a fresh buy.
ZEREBRO lacks the trade quality and clear edge needed for action here.
MAVIA is too thin and noisy to trust as an actionable setup despite some directional bias.
DASH still looks like a valid squeeze-style long, but the veto state keeps it in watch mode rather than the buy bucket.
CHILLGUY remains extended and crowded, but not clean enough to trade under veto conditions.
MERL has some trend strength but not enough structural edge or execution quality to justify action.
